mission: Fit every DreamCo bot into one Buddy-governed workforce where each bot can do safe autonomous work, learn its category, build sandbox systems, and prepare money-making opportunities with approval gates.

policy: Use local deterministic tools first for scans, tests, JSON, TypeScript, Python imports, and repo repair.
Let users choose other model families when configured, but keep Buddy as the router and final safety judge.
No paid model call, live outreach, money movement, legal filing, public deployment, or account mutation runs without approval.
Every model recommendation must include strengths, limits, likely cost posture, and test evidence before production use.

aggressive_mode.cost_policy: use local scripts, cached reports, static dashboards, and free or low-cost model routes first
aggressive_mode.github_policy: manual or path-gated actions only unless owner approves more GitHub minutes
hard_limits: no production deployment without explicit owner approval
aggressive_mode.label: Aggressive Mode
what_it_runs: scan every bot registry and connection report
queue every bot for sandbox-first test or rebuild packets
run local syntax and smoke checks before GitHub Actions
run GitHub cost saver and repository stewardship scans
refresh AI model routing and Gemini low-cost paths
summarize approval gates and next best actions

operating_system.storage_policy: Store only useful summaries, source evidence, test results, approvals, compact fix recipes, and client deliverables.
